game_name: Low G Man: The Low Gravity Man

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Maximum power reaches three screen-heights; enables enemy defeat without freeze ray, generating more power-ups
Freezes enemies; player must stab from top or bottom with extending spear to defeat
Used after freeze ray to kill frozen enemies from directional approach
Tactical variety for different enemy and environmental challenges
Stage-ending confrontations requiring mastery of core mechanics and weapon system

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Fast-paced with action-heavy combat rhythm; low-gravity jumping creates unpredictable momentum requiring skill-based platforming tension

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to low-gravity mechanics and freeze-ray freeze-and-stab combat system in Chapter 1-1
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalation with additional weapon types (fireballs, boomerangs, force-waves, bombs) and stage variety
difficulty_curve.late_game: Large boss encounters with demanding execution of core mechanics
notable_spikes: Chapter-ending boss battles requiring mastery of freeze-stab timing

notable_level_patterns.description: Enemies encountered primarily through freeze ray + extending spear mechanic; directional approach (top/bottom) matters for success
Three-screen-height jumping creates momentum-based platforming requiring skill and control; high-risk/high-reward vertical traversal
Large-sprite boss enemies at stage conclusions; demands weapon mastery and tactical combat understanding
